[2018-07-29 16:24] swapgo: There are definitely situations where you might want to hold
[2018-07-29 16:25] swapgo: Usually, to make a relevant purchase that you might not be able to make otherwise. Valk has less downside than other units when doing this because of the barriers.
[2018-07-29 16:25] swapgo: Notably, buying another Valk doing this is perfectly acceptable lol
[2018-07-29 16:25] swapgo: It puts massive amounts of pressure
[2018-07-29 16:25] willflame: yeah ok, that makes sense
[2018-07-29 16:27] swapgo: Later in the game, it's better to keep clicking it to generate "two" attack. If there's no better absorb than Wall in the set, holding it can be useful too since it's essentially an IGrid that threatens four, so essentially, it's Odin
